data.title: Zero Trust Security Model
data.description: A strict identity verification process for all users, internal or external.

data.title: Advanced Threat Protection
data.description: Continuous monitoring for abnormal activities across the network.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning algorithms and AI-driven insights.

data.title: Data Encryption Protocols
data.description: Ensures data at rest and in transit are encrypted at all times.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Frequent security assessments to identify and mitigate potential vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Independent third-party audits and penetration testing.

data.title: Incident Response Plan
data.description: Comprehensive strategy to respond to security incidents effectively.
data.technical_spec: Detailed incident response playbooks and communication protocols.
